title: Toolchain Selection, Compatibility, and Reproducible Setup · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Select a minimal compatible toolchain and prove clean-machine setup. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a pinned bootstrap and compatibility matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin supported runtime and package-manager versions with one authoritative source.
Commit appropriate lockfiles and verify deterministic clean installs.
Choose tools with clear ownership and minimal duplicate diagnostics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Runtime Version · changed case
steps.instruction:

content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: gates toolchain. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Runtime Version, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a pinned bootstrap and compatibility matrix.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Latest floating versions produce reproducible builds. This fails the Runtime Version contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

stimulus.title: Bootstrap Smoke case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Use a changed review case derived from this module: gates toolchain. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: If setup works on the author machine it is documented correctly.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Test setup, build, and checks from a clean environment. Artifact under review: a pinned bootstrap and compatibility matrix.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Bootstrap Smoke, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Record what required effort
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Bootstrap Smoke applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Test setup, build, and checks from a clean environment.
